templates.title: Personal Budget Tracker
templates.description: Comprehensive personal budget template with income tracking, expense categorization, and savings goals.
templates.long_description: This template helps you track your personal finances with detailed income and expense categories. Features include monthly budget vs actual comparisons, savings goal tracking, expense categorization, and visual dashboards for financial insights.

templates.title: Sales Dashboard with KPIs
templates.description: Real-time sales dashboard with key performance indicators, trends, and team performance tracking.
templates.long_description: Professional sales dashboard template featuring revenue tracking, conversion rates, team performance metrics, and visual charts for trend analysis. Includes automated data refresh and custom KPI calculations.

templates.title: Project Timeline Manager
templates.description: Gantt chart-style project timeline with task dependencies, milestones, and progress tracking.
templates.long_description: Complete project management template with Gantt chart visualization, task dependencies, milestone tracking, resource allocation, and progress dashboards. Perfect for managing complex projects with multiple stakeholders.

templates.title: Employee Leave Tracker
templates.description: HR template for tracking employee leave balances, requests, and approval workflows.
templates.long_description: Comprehensive HR template for managing employee leave including vacation, sick days, and personal time off. Features include leave balance calculations, request tracking, approval workflows, and calendar views.

templates.title: Inventory Management System
templates.description: Complete inventory tracking with reorder points, supplier management, and stock alerts.
templates.long_description: Professional inventory management template featuring stock level tracking, automatic reorder alerts, supplier management, purchase order generation, and inventory valuation reports.

templates.title: Student Gradebook
templates.description: Teacher gradebook with assignment tracking, grade calculations, and student performance analytics.
templates.long_description: Comprehensive gradebook template for educators featuring student information tracking, assignment management, automatic grade calculations, weighted categories, and performance analytics dashboards.

templates.title: Real Estate Investment Analysis
templates.description: Property investment analysis with ROI calculations, cash flow projections, and comparables.
templates.long_description: Professional real estate analysis template featuring investment property evaluation, ROI calculations, cash flow projections, cap rate analysis, and comparable property tracking.

templates.title: Marketing Campaign Tracker
templates.description: Multi-channel marketing campaign tracking with budget management and performance metrics.
templates.long_description: Marketing campaign management template featuring multi-channel campaign tracking, budget vs spend analysis, performance metrics by channel, ROI calculations, and automated reporting.

templates.title: Financial Statement Analysis
templates.description: Complete financial statement analysis with ratio calculations and trend analysis.
templates.long_description: Professional financial analysis template featuring balance sheet analysis, income statement analysis, cash flow analysis, financial ratio calculations, and trend analysis with visualizations.

templates.long_description: Expense management template featuring expense entry, receipt attachment tracking, category-based reporting, approval workflows, and reimbursement calculations.
